Multilingual Profanity Word Lists (LDNOOBW / Shutterstock)
==============================================================

Source: List of Dirty, Naughty, Obscene, and Otherwise Bad Words
Author: LDNOOBW / Shutterstock
License: CC BY 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)
URL: https://github.com/LDNOOBW/List-of-Dirty-Naughty-Obscene-and-Otherwise-Bad-Words

This project includes word lists for the following languages:
English (en), Chinese (zh), Japanese (ja), Korean (ko), French (fr),
German (de), Russian (ru), Thai (th), Vietnamese (vi), Spanish (es),
Portuguese (pt), Italian (it), Arabic (ar).

The word lists have been merged with other sources under config/safety_words.json.
